title: Forgotten Animatronics
description: An Animatronic Mod Inspired by Management Wanted, That adds forgotten/obscure Animatronics from a variety of places!
body:
![Won't support Bedrock](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/cast-iron-skillet2/Shithead@aa40fd16fbdddff65d6a99787b54a49ab63856b1/icons/wont_support_bedrock.svg)

An Animatronic Mod Inspired by Management Wanted, That adds forgotten/obscure Animatronics from a variety of places! In a vanilla style reminiscent of MW! Bringing attention to these forgotten robots while also allowing you to enjoy them in your Minecraft world! And build your ultimate pizzeria!

From Circus World Jamboree to The Rock A Fire Explosion and beyond! Almost everyone is here! With more coming soon.

Along with animatronics, the stage blocks and others will help you set up a good animatronic show!
